'''√sh-k-ch''' ('''kashakach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debitterize|debitterize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debitterize|debitterize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kashakach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishakach || jishakach || shishakach || kishakach
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushakach || jujushakach || shushushakach || kukushakach
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushakach || jushakach || shushakach || kushakach
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushakach || jushakach || shushakach || kushakach
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshakach || jeshakach || sheshakach || keshakach
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshakach || jojoshakach || shoshoshakach || kokoshakach
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshakach || joshakach || shoshakach || koshakach
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshakach || joshakach || shoshakach || koshakach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shakach || shakach || shakach || shakach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shakach || shakach || shakach || shakach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shakach || shakach || shakach || shakach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shakach || shakach || shakach || shakach
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshakach || jæshakach || shæshakach || kæshakach
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashakach || jajashakach || shashashakach || kakashakach
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashakach || jashakach || shashakach || kashakach
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashakach || jashakach || shashakach || kashakach
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashakach
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashakach
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashakach
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashakachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashakachnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashakachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashakachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashakachnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashakachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashakachro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashakachnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashakachro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashakachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashakachnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashakachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashakachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashakachnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashakachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashakachng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashakachnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashakachng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashakachya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashakachnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashakachya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashakachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashakachnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashakachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashakachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashakachnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashakachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashakachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashakachnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashakachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashakachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashakachnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashakachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashakachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashakachnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashakachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashakachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashakachnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashakachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashakachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashakachnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashakachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashakachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashakachnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashakachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashakachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashakachnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashakachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashakachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashakachnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashakachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashakachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashakachnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashakachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashakachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashakachnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashakachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashakachmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashakachnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashakachmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
